title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Behavior Brief: Destructuring Spread
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js destructuring spread increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use object destructuring, rest, and spread while accounting for shallow copies, accessors, and overwrite order.
Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
